items.title: maintenanceApr 14, 2026V.267 Known IssuesHere you’ll find a list of known and resolved issues from the v.267 - MapleStory x One-Punch Man update.
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
Apr 14, 2026
V.267 KNOWN ISSUES

The Known Issues section focuses on the major issues that have significantly impacted the game and community, and which our team is actively addressing. Please note that while we aim to cover the most impactful issues, this list will not encompass every reported issue. Check back regularly for updates on the status of these issues and information on resolved issues, or any new issues that may have been added.

Here you’ll find a list of known and resolved issues from the v.267 - MapleStory x One-Punch Man update:

KNOWN ISSUES
The Giant Oberon, Giant Titania, Giant Petite Pico, and Giant Brown Puppy Illusion Rings currently display incorrect names in-game, but they appear and function correctly. This issue will be fixed in the upcoming v.268 update.
Using a Royal Face Coupon on female characters is currently granting the Male Mischievous Smirk Face instead of the Female version.
Luxe Sauna coupons obtained from the Divine Wishing Bell loot box are unable to be used. For affected players, expired coupons will be redistributed in a future maintenance.
Terminus weapons and Terminus Defender rewards from the Yakuza Boss would not drop correctly.
RESOLVED ISSUES
April 9, 2026
Resolved an issue where certain non-NX item effects were unable to be toggled off.
Resolved an issue where Hayato's Fleeting Breath skill was doing less damage than intended.
Resolved an issue where checking a Friend's location would not work if players were in different channels.
Resolved an issue where the Favorites feature of the Event List would reset after viewing other tabs.
Resolved an issue where Sia's SHINE Stellar V - Formalhaut skill cooldown would not appear when used within a Skill Sequence.
Resolved an issue where Sia's Stellar II - Algol and SHINE Stellar II - Algol skills did not attack the correct amount of monsters.
Resolved an issue where MapleStory M's Reward Points were able to be claimed in the One-Punch Man Special World. For affected players, remaining mileage will be distributed in a future maintenance.
Resolved an issue where text in the Production Skill UI was not properly displayed.
Resolved an issue where Cash Shop items were missing for some characters that world leaped from Challenger Worlds. The duration of restored Cash Shop items has been extended.
Resolved an issue where Lv. 5 Eluna Necklace and Lv. 5 Eluna Earrings did not grant the EXP increase skill.
Resolved an issue where the AbsoLab Spirit Walker Fan obtained from the AbsoLab Weapon/Dominator Pendant Selection Box did not have set potentials. For affected players, the box has been distribuited via the Gift Drop and can be claimed within 2 weeks.
April 2, 2026
Resolved an issue where Exploration Missions 11 and 12 in the Hero’s Adventure Journal event granted untradable Karma Cubes instead of being tradable within world.
March 26, 2026
Resolved an issue where Magician's Arcane Overdrive skill tooltip incorrectly displayed as 'Damage' and not 'Final Damage'.
Resolved an issue where the following Sia Astelle skills could be activated when using Sol Janus:
Antares
Pole
Starlight
Resolved an issue with Sia Astelle's Enhanced Pole skill.
Resolved an issue where the Black Heart obtained from the Philosopher's Book was incorrectly set as a permanent item instead of having a 30-day duration.
Resolved an issue where the Tinkerer's Chest event quest did not appear after receiving the item from the Marvel Machine.
Resolved an issue where the Party HP UI did not display party member participation indicators during boss fights in Heroic Worlds.
Resolved an issue where Luminous' Liberation Orb skill was attacking slower than intended.
Resolved an issue where Paladin's Mighty Mjolnir's skill effects were shown incorrectly.
Resolved an issue where Wild Hunter's HEXA Another Bite and HEXA Final Attack skills were not benefitting from the Another Bite and Final Attack Boost Nodes.
Resolved an issue where unclaimed reward notifications for the concluded Twilight Eve event would appear when exiting the game.
Resolved an issue where the item description for the Goddess's Special Lv. 225 Gift in the Goddess's Blessing Pass event was displayed incorrectly.
Resolved an issue where the Firestarter skill from the Firestarter Ring was able to be added in the Buff Favorites UI.
Resolved an issue where the Chaotic Pitched Accessory Box obtained from Mystic Frontier was not appearing in the player's inventory.
[Updated 3/27/26] For affected players, Chaotic Pitched Accessory Boxes have been distributed and can be claimed via the Gift Drop.
Resolved an issue where some deleted skills could be crafted.
Resolved an issue with the 'Favorites' button function in the Event List UI.
Resolved an issue with The First Adversary boss' clone skill where it was not functioning as intended.
Resolved an issue when a Sia Astelle character attempts to leave Oort before completing the 'Fallen Stars' quest the guide message displays an incorrect quest to complete.
Resolved an issue where some Cash Shop tabs were not leading to the correct page when clicked.
Resolved an issue where the Maple Inc. ID Badge effect was not properly displayed for the Associate Executive Rank.
Resolved an issue where players were unable to claim rewards with the Reward Distribution feature despite dealing enough damage to the boss.
Resolved an issue where Tera Burning was unable to be applied to Zero characters during character creation.
March 20, 2026
Resolved an issue where the Check-in count for the '[Redux Event] Savage' event was displayed incorrectly.
March 19, 2026
Resolved an issue where players were unable to claim mesos from the Meso Market. For affected players, you can now claim Mesos via the Gift Drop and the Meso Market has been reenabled.
Resolved an issue where Lara's Winding Mountain Ridge could not be resummoned.
Resolved an issue where certain bosses in Heroic Worlds dropped Eternal Fragments due to unintended specifications.
Resolved an issue where certain bosses were dropping incorrect items.
Resolved an issue where Luminous' Liberation Orb was not stacking as intended.
Resolved an issue where dismissing a system message would sometimes cause a softlock.
Resolved an issue where non Sia Astelle job weapons were dropping from Zakum and Hilla in Heroic Worlds.
Resolved an issue where the '[Weekly Quest] Erda's Request' quest did not reset. The quest will reset today at 12:00 AM UTC and will resume its normal weekly reset on Thursday at 12:00 AM UTC.
Resolved an issue where after purchasing a Premium Pass, rewards from the Goddess's Blessing Pass could sometimes not be claimed.
Resolved an issue where Sia Astelle's 5th Job enhancements were not applying to her 6th Job skills.
March 18, 2026
Resolved an issue where certain skill effects from the New Leaf Mall Food Court event were not applying.
items.bodyZh: **维护公告** 2026年3月19日 V.267 已知问题 “已知问题”部分主要关注对游戏和社区造成重大影响，且我们团队正在积极处理的主要问题。请注意，虽然我们力求涵盖影响最大的问题，但此列表不会包含所有已报告的问题。请定期查看此处，以获取这些问题状态的更新、已解决问题的信息，或可能新增的问题。 以下是 v.267 - 《冒险岛》x《一拳超人》更新中的已知问题与已解决问题列表： **已知问题** **通用** * 主要城镇（如射手村、无名村、赛尔尼姆广场等）中缺失尤莉亚 NPC。 * 从“哲学家的书”中获得的黑色心形道具被错误地设置为永久物品，而非30天期限。此问题将在下次维护中修复，已分发的永久黑色心形道具将被调整为原定的30天期限。 * 魔法师的“奥秘超载”技能描述中错误地显示为“伤害”而非“最终伤害”。 * 在英雄世界中进行首领战时，队伍HP界面不显示队员参与指示器。 * 事件列表UI中的“收藏”按钮功能有时无法正常工作。 * 圣骑士的“强力雷神之锤”技能效果显示不正确。 * 当西亚·阿斯特尔角色在完成“坠落的星辰”任务前尝试离开奥尔特时，引导信息会显示错误的需要完成的任务。 * 女神通行证中“女神的特别225级礼物”的物品描述显示不正确。 * 从神奇机器获得“工匠的宝箱”后，未出现相关的使用任务。 **已解决问题** **2026年3月20日** * 修复了“[重演活动] 野蛮”活动的签到计数显示不正确的问题。 **2026年3月19日** * 修复了玩家无法从金币市场领取金币的问题。受影响的玩家现在可以通过礼物箱领取金币，且金币市场已重新启用。 * 修复了唤灵斗师的“盘绕山脊”无法重新召唤的问题。 * 修复了英雄世界中某些首领因非预期设定掉落永恒碎片的问题。 * 修复了某些首领掉落错误物品的问题。 * 修复了夜光法师的“解放宝珠”未按预期叠加的问题。 * 修复了关闭系统消息有时会导致游戏软锁定的问题。 * 修复了英雄世界中扎昆和希拉掉落非西亚·阿斯特尔职业武器的问题。 * 修复了“[每周任务] 艾尔达的请求”任务未重置的问题。该任务将于今日 北京时间 2026年3月20日 8:00 重置，并将恢复于每周四 北京时间 2026年3月27日 8:00 的正常每周重置。 * 修复了购买高级通行证后，有时无法领取女神祝福通行证奖励的问题。 * 修复了西亚·阿斯特尔的5转强化未应用于其6转技能的问题。 **2026年3月18日** * 修复了新叶商城美食广场活动的某些技能效果未生效的问题。

items.title: maintenanceApr 9, 2026Mac OS Beta UpdatesHere you'll find a list of all macOS Beta updates and changes since launch.
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
Apr 9, 2026
MAC OS BETA UPDATES

The macOS Beta update list focuses on all changes and updates for macOS users during the Beta service. Please check here for what was updated and changed specifically for macOS Beta. Make sure to close and restart your client after an update to ensure you are on the latest build.

Updates:

April 9, 2026

The macOS client was updated to v.0.0.24.
Resolved an issue where jumping would persist when repeating commands.
Adjusted the Dock Icon and Menu Bar.

February 4, 2026

The macOS client was updated to v.0.0.21.
NGS will be updated to 5.3.38.0.

January 8, 2026

Some players have reported experiencing drop in FPS while playing through the macOS client.
We recommend turning off all in-game sound related settings as it may help alleviate this issue.

December 19, 2025

The macOS client was updated to v.0.0.20.
Resolved an issue where there was a discrepancy with available disc space after installation
items.bodyZh:
**维护公告**
2026年4月9日
**macOS Beta 版本更新**

macOS Beta 更新列表汇总了 Beta 服务期间针对 macOS 用户的所有变更与更新内容。请在此处查看 macOS Beta 版本的具体更新与调整。更新后请务必关闭并重启客户端，以确保您运行的是最新版本。

**更新内容：**

**2026年4月9日**

*   macOS 客户端已更新至 **v.0.0.24**。
*   修复了重复执行指令时跳跃动作会持续存在的问题。
*   调整了 Dock 图标与菜单栏。

**2026年2月4日**

*   macOS 客户端已更新至 **v.0.0.21**。
*   NGS 将更新至 5.3.38.0。

**2026年1月8日**

*   部分玩家反馈在通过 macOS 客户端游戏时出现帧率下降的情况。
*   我们建议关闭所有游戏内与声音相关的设置，这可能有助于缓解此问题。

**2025年12月19日**

*   macOS 客户端已更新至 **v.0.0.20**。
*   修复了安装后可用磁盘空间显示存在差异的问题。

items.title: maintenanceApr 7, 2026[Completed] Scheduled Minor Patch - April 9, 2026The maintenance has been completed and we have extended Cash Shop items in your inventory for 6 hours.
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
Apr 7, 2026
[COMPLETED] SCHEDULED MINOR PATCH - APRIL 9, 2026

[Updated April 9 at 10:55 AM PDT] The maintenance has been completed and we have extended Cash Shop items in your inventory for 6 hours. Please restart your Nexon Launcher or Steam to ensure you receive the latest client update.

We will be performing a scheduled minor patch maintenance starting on Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 5:00 AM PDT (8:00 AM EDT / 2:00 PM CEST / 10:00 PM AEST). We anticipate the maintenance to last approximately 6 hours, concluding around 11:00 AM PDT (2:00 PM EDT / 8:00 PM CEST / 4:00 AM AEST April 10).

Times:

Thursday, April 9, 2026
PDT (UTC -7): 5:00 AM - 11:00 AM
EDT (UTC -4): 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM
CEST (UTC +2): 2:00 PM - 8:00 PM
AEST (UTC +10): 10:00 PM - 4:00 AM April 10

What will be unavailable:

All MapleStory game servers.

Changes and Updates:

MapleStory will be updated to v.267.4.0.
Permanent Black Heart items that were distributed from Philosopher's Book have been adjusted to the intended 30-day duration.
[Updated 4/8] Please note that the adjusted Black Heart will have a 30-day duration starting from when the fix occurred on March 26.
NX spent on Marvel Machine will be distributed towards MVP ranks during the maintenance.
[Updated 4/9] Resolved an issue where Cash Shop items were missing for some characters that world leaped from Challenger Worlds. The duration of restored Cash Shop items has been extended.
[Updated 4/9] Resolved an issue where Lv. 5 Eluna Necklace and Lv. 5 Eluna Earrings did not grant the EXP increase skill.
[Updated 4/9] Resolved an issue where the AbsoLab Spirit Walker Fan obtained from the AbsoLab Weapon/Dominator Pendant Selection Box did not have set potentials. For affected players, the box has been distribuited via the Gift Drop and can be claimed within 2 weeks.
[Updated 4/8] Resolved an issue where certain non-NX item effects were unable to be toggled off.
Resolved an issue where Hayato's Fleeting Breath skill was doing less damage than intended.
Resolved an issue where checking a Friend's location would not work if players were in different channels.
Resolved an issue where the Favorites feature of the Event List would reset after viewing other tabs.
Resolved an issue where Sia's SHINE Stellar V - Formalhaut skill cooldown would not appear when used within a Skill Sequence.
Resolved an issue where Sia's Stellar II - Algol and SHINE Stellar II - Algol skills did not attack the correct amount of monsters.
Resolved an issue where MapleStory M's Reward Points were able to be claimed in the One-Punch Man Special World.
[Updated 4/9] For affected players, remaining mileage will be distributed in a future maintenance.
Resolved an issue where text in the Production Skill UI was not properly displayed.
items.bodyZh: **维护公告** 2026年4月7日 **[已完成] 计划性小型补丁维护 - 2026年4月9日** **[更新于太平洋夏令时 4月9日上午10:55 (北京时间 2026年4月10日 1:55)]** 维护已完成，我们已将您背包中的商城物品有效期延长了6小时。请重启Nexon启动器或Steam以确保获取最新的客户端更新。 我们将于**2026年4月9日，星期四**，太平洋夏令时凌晨5:00（东部夏令时上午8:00 / 欧洲中部夏令时下午2:00 / 澳大利亚东部标准时间晚上10:00）开始进行一次计划性小型补丁维护。预计维护将持续约6小时，于太平洋夏令时上午11:00左右结束（东部夏令时下午2:00 / 欧洲中部夏令时晚上8:00 / 澳大利亚东部标准时间 4月10日凌晨4:00）。 **维护时间详情：** 2026年4月9日，星期四 * 北京时间 (UTC +8): 4月9日 晚上8:00 - 4月10日 凌晨2:00 * 太平洋夏令时 (UTC -7): 凌晨5:00 - 上午11:00 * 东部夏令时 (UTC -4): 上午8:00 - 下午2:00 * 欧洲中部夏令时 (UTC +2): 下午2:00 - 晚上8:00 * 澳大利亚东部标准时间 (UTC +10): 晚上10:00 - 4月10日凌晨4:00 **影响范围：** 所有《冒险岛》游戏服务器。 **更新与修复内容：** * 《冒险岛》将更新至版本 v.267.4.0。 * 对通过“哲学家的书”发放的永久黑心物品进行了调整，使其符合原定的30天有效期。 * **[更新于4月8日]** 请注意，调整后的黑心物品有效期将从3月26日修复完成时起计算，持续30天。 * 维护期间，在“奇迹机器”上消耗的NX将计入MVP等级。 * **[更新于4月9日]** 修复了部分从Challenger Worlds进行世界跳跃的角色商城物品丢失的问题。已恢复的商城物品有效期已延长。 * **[更新于4月9日]** 修复了Lv. 5 艾露娜项链和Lv. 5 艾露娜耳环未提供经验值增加技能效果的问题。 * **[更新于4月9日]** 修复了从“阿布索伦武器/统治者吊坠选择箱”中获得的阿布索伦灵魂行者扇子未带有套装潜能的问题。受影响的玩家将通过礼物掉落获得该选择箱，可在2周内领取。 * **[更新于4月8日]** 修复了部分非NX物品效果无法关闭的问题。 * 修复了剑豪“瞬步之息”技能造成的伤害低于预期的问题。 * 修复了当玩家位于不同频道时，查看好友位置功能失效的问题。 * 修复了事件列表的“收藏”功能在查看其他标签页后重置的问题。 * 修复了希娅的“SHINE 星辉 V - 北落师门”技能在技能序列中使用时不显示冷却时间的问题。 * 修复了希娅的“星辉 II - 大陵五”和“SHINE 星辉 II - 大陵五”技能攻击怪物数量不正确的问题。 * 修复了在One-Punch Man Special World中可以领取《冒险岛M》奖励点数的问题。 * **[更新于4月9日]** 对于受影响的玩家，剩余的里程将在未来的维护中发放。 * 修复了生产技能UI中文本显示异常的问题。

items.title: maintenanceMar 24, 2026[Completed] Scheduled Minor Patch - March 26, 2026 The maintenance has been completed and we have extended Cash Shop items in your inventory for 6 hours. Mar 24, 2026Read More
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
Mar 24, 2026
[COMPLETED] SCHEDULED MINOR PATCH - MARCH 26, 2026

[Updated March 26 at 11:06 AM PDT] The maintenance has been completed and we have extended Cash Shop items in your inventory for 6 hours. Please restart your Nexon Launcher or Steam to ensure you receive the latest client update.

We will be performing a scheduled minor patch maintenance starting on Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 5:00 AM PDT (8:00 AM EDT / 1:00 PM CET / 11:00 PM AEDT). We anticipate the maintenance to last approximately 6 hours, concluding around 11:00 AM PDT (2:00 PM EDT / 7:00 PM CET / 5:00 AM AEDT March 27).

Times:

Thursday, March 26, 2026
PDT (UTC -7): 5:00 AM - 11:00 AM
EDT (UTC -4): 8:00 AM - 2:00 PM
CET (UTC +1): 1:00 PM - 7:00 PM
AEDT (UTC +11): 11:00 PM - 5:00 AM March 27

What will be unavailable:

All MapleStory game servers.

Changes and Updates:

MapleStory will be updated to v.267.3.0.
[Updated 3/26] Increased Counter window within the Virtual Combat System event to improve the experience for high-latency users.
Added Plasma Heart to the Meso Shop in the Monster Park Mayhem event.
[Updated 3/25] Resolved an issue where Magician's Arcane Overdrive skill tooltip incorrectly displayed as 'Damage' and not 'Final Damage'.
[Updated 3/25] Resolved an issue where the following Sia Astelle skills could be activated when using Sol Janus:
Antares
Pole
Starlight
[Updated 3/25] Resolved an issue with Sia Astelle's Enhanced Pole skill.
Resolved an issue where the Black Heart obtained from the Philosopher's Book was incorrectly set as a permanent item instead of having a 30-day duration.
Any permanent Black Heart items that have been distributed will be adjusted to the intended 30-day duration.
Resolved an issue where the Tinkerer's Chest event quest did not appear after receiving the item from the Marvel Machine.
Resolved an issue where the Party HP UI did not display party member participation indicators during boss fights in Heroic Worlds.
Resolved an issue where Luminous' Liberation Orb skill was attacking slower than intended.
Resolved an issue where Paladin's Mighty Mjolnir's skill effects were shown incorrectly.
Resolved an issue where Wild Hunter's HEXA Another Bite and HEXA Final Attack skills were not benefitting from the Another Bite and Final Attack Boost Nodes.
Resolved an issue where unclaimed reward notifications for the concluded Twilight Eve event would appear when exiting the game.
Resolved an issue where the item description for the Goddess's Special Lv. 225 Gift in the Goddess's Blessing Pass event was displayed incorrectly.
Resolved an issue where the Firestarter skill from the Firestarter Ring was able to be added in the Buff Favorites UI.
Resolved an issue where the Chaotic Pitched Accessory Box obtained from Mystic Frontier was not appearing in the player's inventory. 
Chaotic Pitched Accessory Boxes will be distributed in a future maintenance.
[Updated 3/27] For affected players, Chaotic Pitched Accessory Boxes have been distributed and can be claimed via the Gift Drop.
Resolved an issue where some deleted skills could be crafted.
Resolved an issue with the 'Favorites' button function in the Event List UI.
Resolved an issue with The First Adversary boss' clone skill where it was not functioning as intended.
Resolved an issue when a Sia Astelle character attempts to leave Oort before completing the 'Fallen Stars' quest the guide message displays an incorrect quest to complete.
Resolved an issue where some Cash Shop tabs were not leading to the correct page when clicked.
Resolved an issue where the Maple Inc. ID Badge effect was not properly displayed for the Associate Executive Rank.
Resolved an issue where players were unable to claim rewards with the Reward Distribution feature despite dealing enough damage to the boss.
Resolved an issue where Tera Burning was unable to be applied to Zero characters during character creation.
items.bodyZh: 维护公告 2026年3月24日 [已完成] 计划性小型补丁维护 - 2026年3月26日 [更新于太平洋夏令时 3月26日上午11:06 (北京时间 2026年3月27日 凌晨2:06)] 维护已完成，我们已将您背包中的商城物品有效期延长了6小时。请重启Nexon启动器或Steam以确保获取最新的客户端更新。 我们将于2026年3月26日星期四太平洋夏令时凌晨5:00 (北京时间 2026年3月26日 晚上8:00) 开始进行一次计划性小型补丁维护。预计维护将持续约6小时，于太平洋夏令时上午11:00左右结束 (北京时间 2026年3月27日 凌晨2:00)。 维护时间详情： 2026年3月26日，星期四 * 北京时间 (UTC +8): 3月26日 晚上8:00 - 3月27日 凌晨2:00 * 太平洋夏令时 (UTC -7): 凌晨5:00 - 上午11:00 * 东部夏令时 (UTC -4): 上午8:00 - 下午2:00 * 欧洲中部时间 (UTC +1): 下午1:00 - 晚上7:00 * 澳大利亚东部夏令时 (UTC +11): 晚上11:00 - 3月27日 凌晨5:00 维护期间将无法访问： 所有《冒险岛》游戏服务器。 变更与更新内容： 《冒险岛》将更新至版本 v.267.3.0。 [更新于3月26日] 扩展了“虚拟战斗系统”活动中的计数器窗口，以改善高延迟用户的体验。 在“怪物公园大乱斗”活动的金币商店中新增了等离子之心。 [更新于3月25日] 修复了魔法师的“奥秘超载”技能提示中错误显示为“伤害”而非“最终伤害”的问题。 [更新于3月25日] 修复了以下希娅·阿斯特勒技能在使用索尔·贾纳斯时可能被激活的问题： 安塔雷斯 极柱 星光 [更新于3月25日] 修复了希娅·阿斯特勒的“强化极柱”技能问题。 修复了从“哲学家的书”中获得的黑色之心被错误设置为永久物品，而非30天有效期的问题。 已分发的任何永久黑色之心物品将被调整为原定的30天有效期。 修复了从“惊奇机器”获得物品后，“工匠的宝箱”活动任务未出现的问题。 修复了在Heroic Worlds中进行首领战时，队伍生命值UI未显示队员参与指示器的问题。 修复了夜光法师的“解放宝珠”技能攻击速度低于预期的问题。 修复了圣骑士的“强力雷神之锤”技能效果显示不正确的问题。 修复了狂豹猎人的HEXA技能“再咬一口”和HEXA技能“最终攻击”未从“再咬一口”和“最终攻击”强化核心中受益的问题。 修复了退出游戏时，会显示已结束的“暮光前夕”活动未领取奖励通知的问题。 修复了“女神的祝福通行证”活动中，“女神的特别225级礼物”物品描述显示错误的问题。 修复了“火焰启动者戒指”的“火焰启动者”技能可被添加到“增益收藏”UI中的问题。 修复了从“神秘边境”获得的“混沌深渊饰品箱”未出现在玩家背包中的问题。 混沌深渊饰品箱将在未来的维护中分发。 修复了部分已删除技能仍可被制作的问题。 修复了“活动列表”UI中“收藏”按钮功能的问题。 修复了“最初的敌对者”首领的分身技能未按预期运作的问题。 修复了希娅·阿斯特勒角色在完成“坠落的星辰”任务前试图离开奥尔特时，引导信息显示错误任务的问题。 修复了部分商城标签页点击后未跳转到正确页面的问题。 修复了“冒险岛公司员工证”效果未为“副执行理事”等级正确显示的问题。 修复了玩家在对首领造成足够伤害后，仍无法通过“奖励分发”功能领取奖励的问题。 修复了在角色创建期间无法对Zero角色应用Tera Burning的问题。

items.title: maintenanceMar 19, 2026[Completed] Unscheduled Channel Maintenance and Live Minor Patch - March 19, 2026The maintenance has been completed please restart your client to ensure you receive the update.M
items.titleZh: [已完成] 非计划频道维护与实时小补丁 - 2026年3月19日
items.body:
MAINTENANCE
Mar 19, 2026
[COMPLETED] UNSCHEDULED CHANNEL MAINTENANCE AND LIVE MINOR PATCH - MARCH 19, 2026

[Updated March 19 at 3:18 PM PDT] The maintenance has been completed please restart your client to ensure you receive the update.

Changes and Updates:

Resolved an issue where players were unable to claim mesos from the Meso Market.
For affected players, you can now claim Mesos via the Gift Drop and the Meso Market has been reenabled.
Resolved an issue where Lara's Winding Mountain Ridge could not be resummoned.
Resolved an issue where certain bosses in Heroic Worlds dropped Eternal Fragments due to unintended specifications.
Resolved an issue where certain bosses were dropping incorrect items.
Resolved an issue where Luminous' Liberation Orb was not stacking as intended.
Resolved an issue where dismissing a system message would sometimes cause a softlock.
Resolved an issue where non Sia Astelle job weapons were dropping from Zakum and Hilla in Heroic Worlds.
Resolved an issue where the '[Weekly Quest] Erda's Request' quest did not reset.
The quest will reset today at 12:00 AM UTC and will resume its normal weekly reset on Thursday at 12:00 AM UTC.
Resolved an issue where after purchasing a Premium Pass, rewards from the Goddess's Blessing Pass could sometimes not be claimed.
Resolved an issue where Sia Astelle's 5th Job enhancements were not applying to her 6th Job skills.

We will be performing an unscheduled channel maintenance and live minor patch today, March 19, 2026 at 1:00 PM PDT (4:00 PM EDT / 9:00 PM CET / 7:00 AM AEDT March 20). We anticipate the maintenance to last approximately 3 hours, concluding around 3:00 PM March 19 PDT (6:00 PM EDT / 11:00 PM CET / 9:00 AM AEDT March 20).

Times:

Thursday, March 19, 2026
PDT (UTC -7): 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM
EDT (UTC -4): 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM
CET (UTC +1): 9:00 PM - 11:00 PM
AEDT (UTC +11): 7:00 AM March 20 - 9:00 AM March 20


What will be unavailable:

Group A

Channels 1-5, 11-15 on Luna and Solis
Channel 1-15 on Scania, Bera, and Hyperion
Channel 1-10 on NA Challenger World-Interactive
Channels 1-20 on Kronos
Channels 1-30 NA Challenger World-Heroic
Channel 1-5 on EU Challenger World-Interactive and EU Challenger World-Heroic
Channels 1-30 NA One-Punch Man Special World
Channels 1-5 EU One-Punch Man Special World
Cross World Party Quest
Group B

Please allow some time when moving between channels.
Channels 6-10, 16-20 on Luna and Solis
Channels 16-30 on Scania, Bera, and Hyperion
Channels 11-20 on NA Challenger World-Interactive
Channels 21-40 on Kronos
Channels 31-60 NA Challenger World-Heroic
Channel 6-10 on EU Challenger World-Interactive and EU Challenger World-Heroic
Channels 31-60 NA One-Punch Man Special World
Channels 6-10 EU One-Punch Man Special World

Please restart your client once maintenance has been completed to ensure you receive the latest update.

This post will be updated with the list of issues resolved after the maintenance has been completed.
items.bodyZh: **维护** 2026年3月19日 **[已完成] 临时频道维护与在线小补丁 - 2026年3月19日** [更新于太平洋夏令时 3月19日下午3:18 (北京时间 2026年3月20日 6:18)] 维护已完成，请重启客户端以确保收到更新。 **变更与更新：** * 修复了玩家无法从金币市场领取金币的问题。 * 受影响的玩家现在可以通过礼物箱领取金币，金币市场已重新启用。 * 修复了神炮王（拉拉）的"蜿蜒山脊"无法重新召唤的问题。 * 修复了英雄世界（Heroic Worlds）中部分首领因非预期设定掉落永恒碎片的问题。 * 修复了部分首领掉落错误物品的问题。 * 修复了夜光法师的"解放宝珠"未按预期叠加的问题。 * 修复了关闭系统消息时偶尔导致软锁定的问题。 * 修复了英雄世界（Heroic Worlds）中，扎昆和希拉掉落非"希娅·阿斯特尔"职业武器的问题。 * 修复了"[每周任务] 艾尔达的请求"任务未重置的问题。 * 该任务将于今日世界标准时间（UTC）凌晨12:00重置，并将于周四世界标准时间（UTC）凌晨12:00恢复正常每周重置。 * 修复了购买高级通行证后，有时无法领取女神祝福通行证奖励的问题。 * 修复了希娅·阿斯特尔的5转强化未对其6转技能生效的问题。 我们将于今天，即**2026年3月19日太平洋夏令时下午1:00（东部夏令时下午4:00 / 中欧时间晚上9:00 / 澳大利亚东部夏令时 3月20日上午7:00）** 进行一次临时频道维护与在线小补丁。预计维护将持续约3小时，于**太平洋夏令时 3月19日下午3:00左右（东部夏令时下午6:00 / 中欧时间晚上11:00 / 澳大利亚东部夏令时 3月20日上午9:00）** 结束。 **维护时间详情：** 2026年3月19日，星期四 * 北京时间 (UTC +8): 3月20日 凌晨4:00 - 上午6:00 * 太平洋夏令时 (UTC -7): 下午1:00 - 下午3:00 * 东部夏令时 (UTC -4): 下午4:00 - 下午6:00 * 中欧时间 (UTC +1): 晚上9:00 - 晚上11:00 * 澳大利亚东部夏令时 (UTC +11): 3月20日 上午7:00 - 上午9:00 **将受影响的内容：** **A组** * Luna 和 Solis 的 1-5、11-15 频道 * Scania、Bera 和 Hyperion 的 1-15 频道 * NA Challenger World-Interactive 的 1-10 频道 * Kronos 的 1-20 频道 * NA Challenger World-Heroic 的 1-30 频道 * EU Challenger World-Interactive 和 EU Challenger World-Heroic 的 1-5 频道 * NA One-Punch Man Special World 的 1-30 频道 * EU One-Punch Man Special World 的 1-5 频道 * 跨世界组队任务 **B组** * 在频道间移动时，请预留一些时间。 * Luna 和 Solis 的 6-10、16-20 频道 * Scania、Bera 和 Hyperion 的 16-30 频道 * NA Challenger World-Interactive 的 11-20 频道 * Kronos 的 21-40 频道 * NA Challenger World-Heroic 的 31-60 频道 * EU Challenger World-Interactive 和 EU Challenger World-Heroic 的 6-10 频道 * NA One-Punch Man Special World 的 31-60 频道 * EU One-Punch Man Special World 的 6-10 频道 维护完成后，请重启您的客户端以确保收到最新更新。 维护完成后，本帖将更新已修复问题的列表。
